name: @palantirKC/claude-schemas
description: v1.55 (foamy-giggling-kettle PR-4) adds OntologyContextApproval primitive at ontology/primitives/ontology-context-approval.ts: type-shape primitive (no factory; runtime helpers live in plugin lib/ontology-context/approval.ts). 12 fields including approvalId (sha256:16), approvalKind enum (auto-low-risk | lead-approved | user-approved), sourceQueryRef, universalOntologyEntryRef, approvedCapabilityRefs, rejectedCapabilityRefs, approvedSurfaceRefs, forbiddenSurfaceRefs, approverIdentity, optional promptId + promptHash. Companion plugin internal handler bridge/handlers/internal/ontology-context-approval-create.ts wraps the factory; pm_intent_router auto-creates approvals when requiredDtc=false AND selectedCapabilities>0 AND impactContext.confidence='high'; pm_lead_brief surfaces pendingContextApprovals[]. Additive MINOR; no edits to v1.0-v1.54 primitives. v1.54 (foamy-giggling-kettle PR-3) promotes UniversalOntologyEntry primitive from plugin lib to schemas/ontology/primitives/ — 6-status literal union ('captured' | 'context-retrieved' | 'clarifying' | 'semantic-approved' | 'dtc-required' | 'routed'), factory + ref helpers. Companion plugin lib/ontology-entry/lifecycle.ts exports transitionUniversalOntologyEntry wired into 4 callers (prompt-front-door-capture + ontology-context-query + pm-semantic-intent-gate + pm-intent-router) emitting phase_completed with phaseTag 'universal-ontology-entry-transitioned'. Additive MINOR. v1.53 (foamy-giggling-kettle PR-1) adds ProjectOntologyIndex<TCapability, TKnownIssue, TProjectScope> generic primitive at ontology/primitives/project-ontology-index.ts plus sub-path export, enabling cross-project consumers to type-check project-local capability + surface + validation-pack + known-issue indexes without reaching into plugin internals. Additive MINOR; no edits to v1.0-v1.52 primitives. v1.52 adds optional Layer 0 Context Engineering clarification fields to SemanticIntentContract for AIP #3/#4 user-Lead intent bridge parity. Shared meta-schemas for ontology-first Claude Code projects. Four axes: ontology, interaction, meta, rendering. v1.44 (sprint-052 W4.B) extends SprintContractDeclaration with 2 optional advisory fields: `taskBudgetTokens` (min 20K — advisory token budget surfaced as countdown to graders; pairs with rule 16 v4.1.0 §Quick Sprint budget tracking) + `taskFitness` ({ species, expectedBenchmark, observedScore? } — per-sprint species selection record + post-hoc fitness, where species matches HarnessSpeciesCostProfile.vendor for pm_recap per-species win-rate aggregation). Hoists `TaskFitness` interface for ergonomic re-use; exports `validateTaskBudgetTokens` + `validateTaskFitness` validators. Additive MINOR — no edits to existing fields. v1.43 (sprint-049 W3.E) adds `"visual"` to RubricDomain enum (pairs with grade-outcome/visual.ts handler that wraps run_playwright_scenario for screenshot-diff scoring). v1.42 (sprint-047 W2.A — Claude Harness 5-Wave pivot) adds 3 new primitives + 1 extension grounding the Claude Harness Infra pivot: GraderEffortLevel (5-level enum: none/low/normal/high/critical) + mapTierToClaudeCodeEffort helper bridging palantir-mini criterion.tier to Anthropic Claude Code CLI /effort flag (Opus 4.7 xhigh / Sonnet 4.6 high) and GPT-5.5's 5-level reasoning.effort enum; HandsManifestDeclaration mirroring OpenAI Agents SDK Manifest schema (LocalDir/GitRepo/EnvVar/S3+GCS+R2 mounts) with workspace-relative dst validation rejecting `..` traversal — backs Wave 3 W3.C SandboxClient interface portability across Unix-local/Docker/Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel sandbox providers; HarnessSpeciesCostProfileDeclaration + 7-vendor inventory (claude-code-cli-max + anthropic-managed-agents + openai-agents-sdk + google-gemini-enterprise + microsoft-foundry + microsoft-copilot-studio + local-ollama) backing the BYO-CLI-via-Max '3rd pricing arbitrage option' positioning per The New Stack 4-vendor pricing-split article (2026-04-18); GradingCriterion extension adds optional `tier: GraderEffortLevel` field for per-criterion grader-effort routing (backwards-compat: missing tier = 'normal'). Additive MINOR; no edits to v1.0-v1.41 primitive bodies. v1.41 (SSoT-3 W2.C) adds CanonicalSourceRegistry primitive: typed registry declaring 10 canonical 1차 자료 sources (5 Palantir + 3 Anthropic + 2 Claude Code) with retrieval cadence per source class (palantir-foundry-canonical / claude-code-native-runtime-canonical / claude-code-reference; default cold/cold/warm cadence). Companion to v1.39.0 ResearchSourceManifest (which is per-subdir manifest); CanonicalSourceRegistry is registry-level (control-plane-wide). Backs cold-start automation: pm-cold-start-orchestrate skill (W2.A) + cold-start-browse-index-loader hook (W2.B) reference structured registry instead of hardcoded paths. v1.40 (SSoT-2 W2.A) adds 10 AIP/Foundry/MCP operational primitives: MCPToolDeclaration (builder vs consumer split + Application Scopes), OntologySimulation (transient graph copy for AIP Evals edit simulation), GlobalBranchingProposal (extends prim-learn-19 with GA approval policies + resource checks + doNotMerge gating), ObjectSecurityPolicy + PropertySecurityPolicy (row/column/cell/object + property-level RBAC), SourceExecutor (5-kind union of function/action/automation/aip-logic/aip-agent), WorkflowLineageGraph (typed Workflow Lineage snapshot), AIPMode + AIPSkill (AI FDE 8-mode router + agent/domain skill taxonomy), grader-domain-extension (19 AIP Evals evaluators → 6 RubricDomain), RetryPolicy (constant/exponential/no-retry union). Additive only; no edits to v1.0-v1.39 primitives. v1.39 adds ResearchSourceManifest primitive (W1.C SSoT-9): typed evidence-source manifest with refresh-class governance (hot/warm/cold default 7/30/90 days), pairing per-source URL + mirror path + lastFetchedAt + optional contentHash. Backs MANIFEST.json files in ~/.claude/research/<topic>/ and the research-staleness-check hook + research_staleness_audit MCP handler + pm-research-staleness-audit skill. (v1.38 reserved; W1.C jumped 1.37→1.39, W2.A jumps 1.39→1.40.) v1.37 adds AIP/Foundry operational primitives: ObjectViewDeclaration, OntologyBranch/Proposal, AIPEvaluation suite/run/experiment, and AIPAgentDeclaration, plus optional ObjectType/ActionType/AIPLogicFunction operational fields. v1.35 (nifty-mixing-diffie — rule 26 Valuable Data Operating Standard) adds 5 substrate-routing primitives: ValueGrade (T0..T4), AgenticMemoryLayer (working/episodic/semantic/procedural per Palantir A1 2026-04-29 blog), LineageRefs (typed actionRid/dryRunRef/outcomePairId), OutcomePairingDeclaration (before/after intervention measurement), RefinementTarget (typed pointer to DH/HC/rubric). Extends DecisionLineage5Dim withWhat with memoryLayers + refinementTarget; extends byWhom with provider-neutral fields (model/provider/interfaceFamily/runtime per LLMI-02). Extends GradingCriterion.memoryLayerApplicability + FeedbackLoop.valueGradeSequence. v1.34 added 3 propagation-audit primitives. v1.33 added 3 ontology-promotion primitives. v1.32 added 3 BackProp loop closure primitives. v1.31 extended RubricDomain with "simulator". v1.30 added SprintContract.mode. v1.27 added AgentDefinition + SkillDefinition. Consumed by palantir-mini plugin and downstream projects.
breaking-changes: Major version signals new canonical primitive surface under ontology/primitives/; existing types.ts interfaces preserved for backcompat
author: palantirKC
